shared_facts: Oil prices reached over $100 per barrel on Thursday.
The United States is engaged in military actions involving Iran.
The Houthi group in Yemen has targeted commercial or oil-related shipping in the Red Sea region.
latest_clusters.synthesis: Heightened military tensions between the United States and Iranian-aligned forces have led to a rise in oil prices and regional instability. Houthi groups have threatened shipping in the Red Sea, while the Iranian government has warned of potential retaliation against nations supporting US military actions. Meanwhile, domestic polling in the United States reflects significant public opposition to the ongoing military engagements.
latest_clusters.confidence: MEDIUM; While core events like the rise in oil prices and military actions are reported across sources, specific tactical claims and the scope of international involvement remain dependent on individual source reporting.

shared_facts: Sonam Wangchuk engaged in a 26-day hunger strike.
Sonam Wangchuk has ended his hunger strike.
The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) is a youth-led movement focused on protests in India.
Protesters are demanding the resignation of the Indian education minister, Dharmendra Pradhan.
Protests were triggered by concerns over exam paper leaks and irregularities in public examinations.
latest_clusters.synthesis: Youth-led protests under the Cockroach Janta Party banner have mobilized in India following widespread concerns regarding public examination paper leaks. Activist Sonam Wangchuk recently concluded a 26-day hunger strike in support of these protesters after negotiating with government representatives. The movement continues to demand education reforms and the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan.
latest_clusters.confidence: HIGH. The sources are consistent regarding the primary actors, the nature of the protests, and the conclusion of the hunger strike.

shared_facts: The United States and Saudi Arabia have signed a 30-year nuclear cooperation agreement, often referred to as a 123 agreement.
The agreement involves the transfer of US nuclear technology to Saudi Arabia for civilian energy purposes.
President Donald Trump has publicly stated that the agreement is subject to Saudi Arabia joining the Abraham Accords.
US Energy Secretary Chris Wright and Saudi Energy Minister Abdulaziz bin Salman signed the agreement on Wednesday.
latest_clusters.synthesis: The United States and Saudi Arabia have signed a 30-year civilian nuclear cooperation agreement, formally known as a 123 agreement. President Donald Trump has stated that the implementation of this deal is contingent upon Saudi Arabia joining the Abraham Accords to normalize relations with Israel. The specific terms of the deal remain largely undisclosed, leading to varying reports regarding provisions for uranium enrichment.
latest_clusters.confidence: MEDIUM.MEDIUM. While sources agree on the signing of the agreement and the link to the Abraham Accords, there is conflicting information regarding the specific terms of enrichment prohibitions.
